headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $113
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $107 to $113.
